library(dplyr)
     
familyid <- read.csv("../11_Strain_tracking/metadata/sink_source.csv")
meta <- read.csv("../1_Decontamination/full_data.csv")
meta <- select(meta, sampleID, Sample)

meta <- filter(meta, meta$sampleID %in% familyid$M1 |
               meta$sampleID %in% familyid$M2 |
               meta$sampleID %in% familyid$B1 |
               meta$sampleID %in% familyid$B2 |
               meta$sampleID %in% familyid$B3 |
               meta$sampleID %in% familyid$B4)


fecal_samples <- select(meta, Sample)
samples <- select(meta, sampleID)
samples <- unique(samples)
write.csv(samples, "sample_list.csv", row.names=FALSE)
     
fecal_samples$flowcell <- sub('.*__', '', fecal_samples$Sample)
fecal_samples$flowcell <- sub("\_.*", "", fecal_samples$flowcell)

flowcell <- select(fecal_samples, flowcell)
flowcell <- unique(flowcell)

write.csv(flowcell, "flowcell_list.csv", row.names=FALSE)
     
moms <- filter(meta, meta$sampleID %in% familyid$M1 |
               meta$sampleID %in% familyid$M2)
moms <- filter(moms, !is.na(Sample))
moms <- select(moms, Sample)
moms <- unique(moms)
moms$Sample <- paste0("114_RoMaNs__", moms$Sample)

write.csv(moms, "mom_samples.csv", row.names=FALSE)
     
moms <- filter(meta, meta$sampleID %in% familyid$B1)
moms <- filter(moms, !is.na(Sample))
moms <- select(moms, Sample)
moms <- unique(moms)
moms$Sample <- paste0("114_RoMaNs__", moms$Sample)
dim(moms)
write.csv(moms, "newborn_samples.csv", row.names=FALSE)

moms <- filter(meta, meta$sampleID %in% familyid$B2)
moms <- filter(moms, !is.na(Sample))
moms <- select(moms, Sample)
moms <- unique(moms)
moms$Sample <- paste0("114_RoMaNs__", moms$Sample)
dim(moms)
write.csv(moms, "month1_samples.csv", row.names=FALSE)

moms <- filter(meta, meta$sampleID %in% familyid$B3)
moms <- filter(moms, !is.na(Sample))
moms <- select(moms, Sample)
moms <- unique(moms)
moms$Sample <- paste0("114_RoMaNs__", moms$Sample)
dim(moms)
write.csv(moms, "month6_samples.csv", row.names=FALSE)

moms <- filter(meta, meta$sampleID %in% familyid$B4)
moms <- filter(moms, !is.na(Sample))
moms <- select(moms, Sample)
moms <- unique(moms)
moms$Sample <- paste0("114_RoMaNs__", moms$Sample)
dim(moms)
write.csv(moms, "month12_samples.csv", row.names=FALSE)
